description: Model a site in Seattle, Washington, USA (Lat: ~47.6°N, Long: ~122.3°W). Create a shed building (10m East-West x 6m North-South footprint) with a North wall of 5m and South wall of 3m, connected to form a south-facing sloped roof. Create a tree proxy (a cylinder 4m in diameter and 9m tall) standing on the ground, centered 8m due South of the shed's South wall midpoint. Use Skelion to fill the south-facing roof with flush-mounted solar panels. Turn on SketchUp Shadows, set the date to December 21 (Winter Solstice), and time to 12:00 PM. Finally, manually delete (prune) any solar panels that are significantly touched by the tree's shadow. Save the resulting model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\pruned_array_seattle.skp'.
